name: Victorian Lace Sleeve Blazer
description: Black lace blazer with dramatic fringed sleeves and deep V-neck satin top underneath. Edgy goth style with intricate patterns.

name: Claw Hand Accessory
description: Metallic claw-shaped hand glove with spikes, perfect for dramatic goth looks. Sharp edges and adjustable fit make it a fierce statement for nights out.

name: Wide Brim Black Hat
description: Oversized black felt hat with fringe sleeve styling, ideal for alternative fashion. This wide brim provides a mysterious silhouette, especially good for foggy days.

name: Embroidered Hooded Scarf
description: Dark embroidered hood-scarf with lace cuffs, mystical forest vibe. Delicate stitching evokes enchanted woods, wrapping you in romantic layers.

name: Chain Necklace Set
description: Layered chain necklaces and harness style for goth layering. Multiple strands create versatile texture, elevating any outfit to look more alternative.

name: Lace Puff Sleeve Blouse
description: Victorian-inspired black lace blouse with puff sleeves and corset details. Soft volume and structured waist blend romance with subtlety for a timeless look.

name: Band T-shirt
description: Heavy cotton T-shirt material design to give you that boyfriend fit and oversized look. Band logo design is large and high quality embrodiery. Cinched fit and texture create an elegant silhouette.

name: Waist Corset
description: Waist corset can be added to any blouse or dress for a more fitted shape. Not only does it function for a better fit but also adds an edge to any outfit.

name: Cut out Lace Blouse
description: Simple black lace blouse with clean lines for versatile goth styling. The delicate layers are not flashy yet add depth and personality to an outfit.

name: Layered Tulle Dress
description: Multi-layer black tulle dress with platform boots, dramatic goth silhouette. The ethereal dress flows with bold hems, perfect for a haunted evening of romance.

name: Gothic Lolita Dress
description: Lace-trimmed gothic lolita dress with corset waist and petticoat volume. Sweet ruffles and defined shaping create playful, doll-like lolita style silhouette.

name: Victorian Blouse Dress
description: High-neck lace dress with puffed sleeves and ruffled skirt. Ornate collars and flared tiers channel elegant mourning attire from bygone eras

name: Asymetrical Dress
description: Short tiered dress with an asymetrical look to set you apart. This dress's mesh details are shown off by its simple structure focused on the bottom hem.

name: Wilted Rose Dress
description: Classic black dress holding wilted roses, with puffed sleeves and lace cuffs. Decaying floral motifs add more details to its vintage charm.

name: Forest Corset Dress
description: Corseted gown with bell sleeves in dark romantic forest theme. Lush velvet and embroidered vines weave wilderness mystery into fitted opulence.

name: Urban Skater Dress
description: Pleated layered dress designed for comfort and movement at the skatepark. Don't let your alternative style stop you from being active with this dress designed for activity!
